pi_items.source: Task instructions and environment scripts (downloads from https://downloads.mysql.com/docs/sakila-db.zip)
sakila-schema.sql which defines the 'film' table containing movie records
Directly parsed sakila-data.sql INSERT statements for the 'film' table, filtering for rental_rate > 2.99
Task instruction explicitly requests this exact output path
Task description and query logic in verifier.py
Directly parsed sakila-data.sql, matching the top 10 film records by ID with rental_rate > 2.99

privileged_info_summary: The task requires querying the official MySQL 'sakila' sample database. Analysis of the official sakila-data.sql file confirms there are exactly 336 films in the 'film' table with a rental_rate strictly greater than 2.99. The first 10 matching films ordered by ID are ACE GOLDFINGER, AIRPLANE SIERRA, AIRPORT POLLOCK, ALADDIN CALENDAR, ALI FOREVER, AMELIE HELLFIGHTERS, AMERICAN CIRCUS, ANTHEM LUKE, APACHE DIVINE, and APOCALYPSE FLAMINGOS. The target export path is explicitly /home/ga/Documents/exports/expensive_films.csv as requested in the prompt.
